name: Fine Dining
design_laws_applied: Design Law 1 — Restaurants / Fine Dining (dark + saturated gold)
Design Law 2 — Luxury typography (Bodoni Moda display + Hanken Grotesk body)
Design Law 4 — Full-bleed-image hero with mouse parallax (4%) + cinematic gradient + hairline frame + scroll-cue
Design Law 5 — Sticky transparent header with scroll progress hairline, mobile hamburger at md, 44px tap targets
Design Law 6 — Subtle animation (no continuous loops, prefers-reduced-motion respected)
Design Law 7 — Sharp radius (0–4px) — Design Law 7 sharp category
Design Law 9 — Responsive (base / sm / md / lg / xl) with container max 1280px
signature_elements: Hairline frame (top + bottom) on hero, footer, and section dividers
Eyebrow ornament — gold hairline (8px) + uppercase label
Italic Bodoni Moda accent words inside serif headlines
Mouse parallax on hero (8px translate, 1.04 scale) — reduced-motion respected
Scroll progress hairline in the header (1px gold, scales 0→1)
Section headings with sticky position and counter "01 · 02 · 03"
